summary:
There is no recorded trial called "TONE" studying erythropoietin foroptic neuritis; instead, evidence refers to the ONTT trial demonstrating benefits of corticosteroids. Erythropoietin remains unproven in treatment for optic neuritis, supported by pilot studies lacking conclusive outcomes in large randomised trials.  

\boxed{B}

\boxed{B}. Answer choice: B
